name: Aleyda Solis
reason: Coverage for seo-technical-optimization-onpage and automated-publishing-and-cicd sub-domains. European Search Personality of the Year 2018, founder of Orainti consultancy. Author of SEO Las Claves Esenciales (Anaya Publishing), creator of LearningAIsearch.com and SEOFOMO newsletter with 35K+ subscribers. Expert in international SEO, technical SEO implementation, and AI search optimization (GEO/AEO).
